failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_001: Delinquent tax interest correctly calculated at $2,558.40
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the settlement statement uses $2,558.40 as the delinquent tax interest amount (based on 6.5 months × 1.5%/month × $26,240.00), NOT the $2,362.80 figure from the municipal payoff statement. FAIL if the agent uses $2,362.80 or any figure other than $2,558.40 (or a figure within $1 of $2,558.40 due to rounding).

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_001: Discrepancy in tax interest flagged in notes
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the notes memorandum identifies a discrepancy between the City of Bridgeport's stated delinquent tax interest ($2,362.80) and the agent's independently calculated figure ($2,558.40), explaining that the city used 6 months but the correct period is 6.5 months (January 2 through July 15, 2025). FAIL if no discrepancy is noted or the agent simply accepts the city's figure without question.

failed_criteria.title: Total delinquent taxes plus interest is $28,798.40 on seller side
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the total delinquent property tax obligation charged to the seller (principal plus interest) equals $28,798.40 ($26,240.00 + $2,558.40), whether shown as one combined line or two separate lines. FAIL if a different total is used.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_002: Residential security deposit interest of $270.02 included
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the settlement statement includes accrued interest on residential security deposits totaling $270.02 (or an amount within $1 of $270.02) as part of the security deposit transfer credit to the buyer, in addition to the $18,000.00 principal. FAIL if only the principal deposit amounts are transferred without any interest, or if interest is omitted entirely.

failed_criteria.title: Total security deposit transfer is $32,670.02
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the grand total security deposit transfer (residential principal $18,000 + residential interest $270.02 + commercial $14,400) equals $32,670.02 (or within $2 due to rounding). FAIL if the total is materially different.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_005: CT conveyance tax uses tiered rate ($44,750 total)
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the Connecticut real estate conveyance tax is calculated using a tiered rate: 0.75% on the first $800,000 ($6,000) plus 1.25% on the remaining $3,100,000 ($38,750), for a total of $44,750.00. FAIL if a flat rate is applied to the entire purchase price (e.g., 1.25% × $3,900,000 = $48,750) or any other incorrect calculation is used.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_005: Bridgeport identified as targeted investment community
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the output references Bridgeport's status as a 'targeted investment community' (or equivalent term such as 'designated municipality') under Connecticut law as relevant to the conveyance tax rate structure. FAIL if no mention is made of this designation and its effect on the tax rate.

failed_criteria.title: Seller's next-year property tax proration credit to buyer is $2,012.60
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the seller's share of the next fiscal year's (July 1, 2025 – June 30, 2026) property taxes is $2,012.60 (14/365 × $52,480.00), shown as a credit to the buyer / charge to the seller. FAIL if the amount is materially different or the proration is omitted.

failed_criteria.title: Cash due from buyer at closing is approximately $1,083,294.84
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the total cash due from the buyer at closing is $1,083,294.84 (or within $20 of this figure, allowing for minor rounding differences). FAIL if the amount is materially different (more than $20 variance).

failed_criteria.title: Net proceeds to seller approximately $2,864,198.55
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the net proceeds to the seller are $2,864,198.55 (or within $20 of this figure, allowing for minor rounding differences). FAIL if the amount is materially different (more than $20 variance).

failed_criteria.title: Buyer's total credits approximately $2,884,472.16
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the total buyer credits are approximately $2,884,472.16 (within $50). FAIL if the total is materially different.

failed_criteria.title: Seller's total debits approximately $1,036,494.45
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the total seller debits/charges are approximately $1,036,494.45 (within $50). FAIL if the total is materially different.
